description: Template for tech/AI/tools posts - digital, neural aesthetics, innovation

data.label: Style
data.name: Comic Ink + Digital Cosmos
data.description: Heavy ink illustration. Bold black outlines, high contrast chiaroscuro with deep blacks and stark highlights. Cel-shaded shadows, graphic shapes. Cool blues and digital accents against void black. Hand-drawn comic book aesthetic with cosmic tech energy. Influenced by Jack Kirby and Moebius. Kirby Krackle effects welcome. NOT photorealistic. Edge-to-edge composition.
